targets.query:
from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "impressions")
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "clicks")
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "conversions")
  |> sum()

import "math"

clks = from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "clicks")
  |> sum()

imps = from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "impressions")
  |> sum()

join(tables: {clks: clks, imps: imps}, on: ["_measurement"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: if r._value_imps > 0.0 then (r._value_clks / r._value_imps) * 100.0 else 0.0, _field: "ctr", _time: now()}))

convs = from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "conversions")
  |> sum()

clks = from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "clicks")
  |> sum()

join(tables: {convs: convs, clks: clks}, on: ["_measurement"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: if r._value_clks > 0.0 then (r._value_convs / r._value_clks) * 100.0 else 0.0, _field: "conv_rate", _time: now()}))

from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "impressions")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: sum, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(value: 0.0)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Impressions")

from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "clicks")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: sum, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(value: 0.0)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Clicks")

from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "conversions")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: sum, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(value: 0.0)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Conversions")

panels.title: Top 10 States by Impressions — last hour

targets.query:
from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "impressions")
  |> group(columns: ["state"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)
  |> rename(columns: {state: "_field"})

from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "revenue" and r.type == "conversions")
  |> group(columns: ["advertiser_id"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)
  |> rename(columns: {advertiser_id: "_field"})
